scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:unit: npx --yes tsx artifacts/api-server/src/lib/admin-permissions.test.ts && npx --yes tsx artifacts/api-server/src/lib/epic17.test.ts && npx --yes tsx artifacts/nextjs-app/lib/analytics-utils.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types artifacts/nextjs-app/lib/mvp-marketplace.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types artifacts/nextjs-app/lib/nfr.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types artifacts/nextjs-app/lib/persona-workflows.test.ts
